mapper.insert: insert into member_card_refund_order (refund_order_no, sale_order_no, member_card_id, member_id, member_no, card_type_id, card_type_name, refund_amount, refund_type, refund_status, reason, refund_time, dept_id, operator_id, operator_name, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_del) values (#{refundOrderNo}, #{saleOrderNo}, #{memberCardId}, #{memberId}, #{memberNo}, #{cardTypeId}, #{cardTypeName}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundType}, #{refundStatus}, #{reason}, #{refundTime}, #{deptId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{remark}, now(), now(), 0)
mapper.select: select * from member_card_refund_order where refund_order_no = #{refundOrderNo} and is_del = 0
select * from member_card_refund_order where member_card_id = #{memberCardId} and is_del = 0 limit 1
